title: Adapalene: MedlinePlus Drug Information
text:
Gently wash the affected skin with a mild soap or soapless cleanser and pat dry with a soft towel. Do not use harsh or abrasive cleansers, and do not scrub your skin vigorously. Ask your doctor or pharmacist to recommend a gentle cleanser. If you are using the gel or cream, use your fingers to spread a thin film of medication over the affected area. 
If you are using a pledget, remove it from the foil pouch and gently wipe the affected area. If you are using the solution, apply a thin layer to the affected area using a clean cotton swab or other applicator. Adapalene lotion comes in a pump that dispenses measured amounts of the medication. If you are using the lotion, press down on the top of the pump 3â4 times so that the medication comes out onto your palm and apply a thin film of the medication over the affected area. Adapalene should be applied to the entire affected area, not only to a single pimple or spot. You may feel a slight warmth or stinging in the place where you applied adapalene. 
This feeling is normal and should go away by itself in a short time. If you used a pledget, discard it after use. Do not save it to use again. Other uses for this medicine 
This medication may be prescribed for other uses; ask your doctor or pharmacist for more information.
What special precautions should I follow? 
Before taking adapalene, tell your doctor and pharmacist if you are
